policyDisplayName.value: All Virtual Networks must be protected by DDoS Protection Standard

policyDescription.value: This policy ensures that all Virtual Networks in the subscription have DDoS Protection Standard enabled. VNets without DDoS Protection Standard are considered non-compliant.

assignmentDisplayName.value: Enforce DDoS Protection Standard on all Virtual Networks

assignmentDescription.value: Assigns the DDoS Protection Standard policy to enforce compliance across all Virtual Networks.

nonComplianceMessage.value: Virtual Networks must have DDoS Protection Standard enabled. Please associate a DDoS Protection Plan and set enableDdosProtection to true.
